subject: Daein
fact: Daein declined the offer of a political career because he preferred to keep his head attached to his body.
source_quote: Daein declined immediately, stating he preferred to keep his head attached to his body

subject: Daein
fact: Daein was shocked by the revelation of Akritas's stealth ability.
source_quote: shocking Daein who realizes he now has a plus 20 stealth bonus

subject: Daein
fact: Daein realized the implications of the Pass Without Trace spell on his stealth checks.
source_quote: Daein who realizes he now has a plus 20 stealth bonus

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas expressed frustration at being drawn into Emerald Enclave affairs despite being a member.
source_quote: Akritas expresses frustration at being drawn into Emerald Enclave affairs despite being a member

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas noted that she does not attend all meetings or read all communications for the Emerald Enclave.
source_quote: noting she doesn't attend all meetings or read all communications

subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: Murssvayas initially seemed offended by the party's mercenary question about rewards.
source_quote: Murssvayas initially seemed offended by the mercenary question

subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: Murssvayas warned that the fire giants were powerful enough to destroy a Drow city with all its defenses.
source_quote: He warned that the fire giants were powerful enough to destroy a Drow city with all its defenses

subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: Murssvayas warned that Hillsfar would stand no chance against a fire giant assault.
source_quote: and that Hillsfar would stand no chance against such an assault

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim recognized the pendant Murssvayas produced as belonging to Solom Ned'razak.
source_quote: Bramgrim recognized as belonging to Solom Ned'razak

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim insisted on knowing what reward the party would receive for the mission.
source_quote: Bramgrim then insisted on knowing what reward the party would receive for such a dangerous mission

subject: Daein
fact: Daein questioned whether the Drow's promise of an item from their horde could be trusted.
source_quote: Though Daein questioned whether this promise could be trusted

subject: The party
fact: The party decided to keep their beloved owlbear companion safe in future conflicts.
source_quote: determined to keep their beloved beast safe in future conflicts

subject: The owlbear
fact: The owlbear seemed to recognize Murssvayas with unusual familiarity.
source_quote: who seemed to recognize him with unusual familiarity

subject: The Red Plume guards
fact: The Red Plume guards' resolve wavered when they recognized the heroes.
source_quote: the guards' resolve wavered when they recognized the heroes

subject: The Red Plume guards
fact: The Red Plume guards wisely stepped aside to let the party pass.
source_quote: and they wisely stepped aside

subject: The party's future plans
fact: The party discussed future plans including mining uranium, opening a restaurant called 'Heroes of Hillsfar', and seeking vouching from the clerics of Selûne.
source_quote: The party discusses various future plans, including mining uranium, opening a restaurant called 'Heroes of Hillsfar', and seeking vouching from the clerics of Selûne

subject: Charles
fact: Charles emphasized that demons seek chaos and destruction for its own sake.
source_quote: Charles emphasized that demons sought chaos and destruction for its own sake

subject: Charles
fact: Charles warned that the price for fighting evil always increases the longer one delays.
source_quote: warning them that the price for fighting evil always increased the longer one delayed

subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: Murssvayas emphasized the greater threat to both the Underdark and the surface world when dismissing payment.
source_quote: emphasizing the greater threat to both the Underdark and the surface world

subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: Murssvayas revealed that Solom Ned'razak had anticipated the party's question about reward.
source_quote: Murssvayas revealed that Solom had anticipated this very question

subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: Murssvayas assured the party of the Drow's honor regarding their promise.
source_quote: but Murssvayas assures them of the Drow's honor

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana sees the recent chaos and death of the ruling elite as creating many opportunities for her guild.
source_quote: seeing the recent chaos and death of the ruling elite as creating many opportunities for her guild

subject: the party
fact: The party declines the political power offered by Isthana.
source_quote: offers them political power in Hillsfar, which they decline

subject: Charles
fact: Charles is known for his dramatic and somewhat over-the-top demeanor.
source_quote: known for his dramatic and somewhat over-the-top demeanor

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak anticipated the party would ask for a reward.
source_quote: anticipated the party would ask for a reward

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim recognizes Solom's Pendant as authentic.
source_quote: Bramgrim recognizes it as authentic

subject: Daein
fact: Daein is shocked by the revelation of Akritas's Pass Without Trace ability.
source_quote: The revelation of this ability shocked Daein

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim realizes that Pass Without Trace gives Daein a plus 20 to stealth.
source_quote: who realized it gives Daein a plus 20 to stealth

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim realizes that Pass Without Trace gives the owlbear a plus 11.
source_quote: and the owlbear a plus 11

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim notes that Greater Restoration is always good to have around for its powerful restorative properties.
source_quote: noted as always good to have around for its powerful restorative properties

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim notes that Calm Emotions is the only thing that works on a creature referred to as 'sphere'.
source_quote: specifically mentioned as being the only thing that works on a creature referred to as 'sphere'
